preprocessing.description: Per-pixel L2 normalization, then average across the 9 1m pixels in the 3x3 window centered on each 3m target. Apply water-band mask (see water_band_ranges_nm). Subtract PCA center, multiply by PCA rotation to get PC1..PC20.

notes: Classifier trained on training_samples_sites.csv with final_label as target. Features: spec_PC01..PC20, ndvi, ndwi, pri, red_edge_slope, cai, ndli, snow_free_doy.
